Design system · v0.1

A system for waste that works.

Tokens, primitives, and full-product surfaces for the Relowa B2B platform — neutral-first UI, neon green as the action signal, dark green as the trust anchor. Turkish-first, EU-expandable, industrial-scale.

UI kits
Recycler · Web
Dashboard → Pazar Yeri → İhaleler → Operasyon → ESG
→

Dashboard → İhale Oluştur → Teklif Yönetimi
→
Carrier · Web
Dashboard → Aktif İlanlar → Tekliflerim → Geçmiş
→
Marketing site
Public landing · hero + features + CTA
→
